pi_items.source: Verified via `setup_task.sh` which executes UI automation to manually select and delete the item named 'SRS-6' from the document.

Contradicted by inspecting the initial document state in `ExampleProject/documents/SRS.json`. 'SRS-6' is actually a section heading titled 'User interfaces' located under the 'Introduction' section, not a requirement about authentication in the 'Security' section. The substring 'authenticate Users' does not appear anywhere in the document.
Verified by reading `scripts/task_utils.sh` which creates the project folder at this location.
Verified by inspecting the file structure of `ExampleProject`.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires restoring the deleted requirement 'SRS-6'. The environment sets up a synthetic test project at '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/RecoverTask_project' and uses UI automation to delete 'SRS-6' from 'documents/SRS.json'. Crucially, the task description and metadata falsely claim 'SRS-6' specifies authentication behavior in the 'Security' section. In reality, analyzing the underlying JSON project data reveals 'SRS-6' is a section heading titled 'User interfaces' located under the 'Introduction' section, and the text 'authenticate Users' is entirely absent from the document.
